descFull: Real-time OSINT command center monitoring the Middle East conflict — 50+ live open-source intelligence sources (news, Telegram, military aircraft & naval tracking, missile alerts, prediction & defense markets) in one dashboard. No API keys. Free. Next.js + TypeScript.
